goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should 'leave after 16:00' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'jesus green outdoor pool'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'phone number', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on saturday
The train should leave after 16:00 and should depart from london liverpool street
Make sure you get price and arrival time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called jesus green outdoor pool
Make sure you get postcode, phone number, and address
